questionHtml: Friction and air resistance act on the bicycle and the girl when they move. Assume that all the energy is transferred from the battery to the electric motor. Determine the total average resistive force that acts on the bicycle and the girl.
markschemeHtml:
use of power = force × speed OR force × distance = power × time ✔

«34N» ✔

Award [2] for a bald correct answer.

Accept 34 N – 36 N.
